title: Walk-in Drive Real Estate Agent at Akshaya Private Limited

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Real Estate Agent at Akshaya Private Limited
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Akshaya Private Limited. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Real Estate Agent to strengthen our Agra-based team.

About Akshaya Private Limited:
Akshaya Private Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Akshaya Private Limited!
